title: Council Appoints Salmon Bycatch Committee
summary: The Council appointed members to the newly formed Salmon Bycatch Committee , which will hold its first meeting on November 28, 2022. The NPFMC Salmon Bycatch Committee will be co-chaired by two Council members, Andy Mezirow and Rachel Baker. Members and their affiliations are listed below. The Novem...

title: Juneau events showcase music on the science of climate change
summary: University of Alaska Fairbanks scientists have teamed up with the Juneau Composers Consortium and Con Brio Chamber Series for a unique program of original musical works that interpret climate research. “Climate Soundscapes” will premiere at two concerts in Juneau — at 7:30 p.m. Friday, Nov. 18, in the Ḵunéix̱ Hídi Northern Light...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 31 October, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 31 October, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: SNC Announces a Record-Breaking 2022 Trust Heritage Distribution
summary: November 3, 2022 The Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Board of Trustees is pleased to declare a $10.50 per Trust Unit Heritage Distribution to all SNC Trust Beneficiaries on record as of November 3, 2022; $1,050 for those with 100 Trust Units. This is a 10.5% increase from 2021 and represents the largest distribution in the Trust’s h...
